[property]
gpu-id=0
net-scale-factor=0.00392156862745098
model-color-format=0

# DeepStream-Yolo exported ONNX.
# Generated by scripts/setup_yolo12n_model.sh.
onnx-file=/home/user/deepstream-work/models/yolo12n.onnx

# Important: engine path must be ONNX path + _b1_gpu0_fp16.engine.
model-engine-file=/home/user/deepstream-work/models/yolo12n.onnx_b1_gpu0_fp16.engine

labelfile-path=/home/user/deepstream-work/models/coco_labels.txt

batch-size=1
network-mode=2
num-detected-classes=80
interval=0
gie-unique-id=1
process-mode=1
network-type=0

# DeepStream-Yolo parser.
parse-bbox-func-name=NvDsInferParseYolo
custom-lib-path=/home/user/deepstream-work/lib/libnvdsinfer_custom_impl_Yolo.so
output-blob-names=output

# Let nvinfer resize to the model. The Python app corrects bbox geometry
# before OSD if metadata arrives in model-coordinate space.
maintain-aspect-ratio=1
symmetric-padding=1

cluster-mode=2

[class-attrs-all]
pre-cluster-threshold=0.25
nms-iou-threshold=0.45
topk=300

# Person only: class 0.
[class-attrs-0]
pre-cluster-threshold=0.25
nms-iou-threshold=0.45
topk=300
